---
title: Verification of a Verilog-Based LED Driver Using cocotb and Gatemate FPGA Platform
author:
 - name: Sneha Shree Katepalli
   Matriculation number: 5364673
   email: snehashree499@gmail.com
   affiliations:
      - Hochschule Bremen
citation:
  url: https://github.com/snehashree499/CEMS_DSM
---


{{< include /content/_sec_intro.qmd >}}
{{< include /content/_sec_probstatement.qmd >}}
{{< include /content/_sec_objectives.qmd >}}
{{< include /content/_sec_approach.qmd >}}
